summary: Hotfix post FASE 3 Villa Paris testing complete. All features verified: Report Operativo and Report Eventi coexist as separate modules, Primo contatto appears correctly in calendar as dedicated entry distinct from appointments/events.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_PrimoContatto_Oggi client for calendar testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotfix verified: Report Operativo (/report/azienda) and Report Eventi (/report/eventi) coexist as separate modules in sidebar. Primo contatto entries appear in calendar with dedicated styling (brown/amber color) and '1° contatto' label, distinct from appuntamenti (purple) and eventi confermati (green). Filter 'Primi contatti' works correctly.

report_eventi_api.details: GET /api/report/eventi/stats returns 200 with year stats, monthly data, byTipo, totals

report_operativo_page.details: Page loads with FASE 3 badge, filters, KPI cards, charts, tables

report_eventi_page.details: Page loads with title, description, filters, 4 KPI cards (Eventi, Ospiti, Ricavi, Ticket), 4 charts, preview table

calendario_primo_contatto_display.details: Primo contatto entries appear in calendar with dedicated brown/amber color and '1° contatto' label

calendario_primi_contatti_filter.details: Filter 'Primi contatti' button works, shows only primo contatto entries

calendario_day_panel_primo_contatto.details: Day panel shows primo contatto as dedicated entry with 'Primo contatto' type and '1° contatto' badge

no_duplicate_primo_contatto.details: Primo contatto entries from clienti API are deduplicated against eventi with same dataPrimoContatto

api_verification.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - Returns user info and sets vp_token cookie
api_verification.GET /api/report/stats: 200 - Returns OperationalReportResponse with meta, summary, sources, operators, trend, clients, activities
api_verification.GET /api/report/eventi/stats: 200 - Returns year stats with monthly, byTipo, totals
api_verification.GET /api/report/eventi.xlsx: 200 - Returns valid Excel file with Report Aziendale and Anagrafica Clienti sheets
api_verification.GET /api/clienti: 200 - Returns clients list with dataPrimoContatto for calendar

ui_verification.sidebar: Shows both 'Report Operativo' and 'Report Eventi' as separate menu items
ui_verification.report_operativo_page: Hero with FASE 3 badge, Export Excel/PDF buttons, filters, policy banner, KPI cards, charts, tables
ui_verification.report_eventi_page: Title, description, Scarica Excel button, filters card, 4 KPI cards, 4 charts (Ricavi, Eventi, Ospiti, Tipi per mese), preview table
ui_verification.calendario_page: Primo contatto entries shown with dedicated color (brown/amber), '1° contatto' badge in day panel, 'Primi contatti' filter works
